design: B-coupled: DECODE_ATTN_AMDGCN_TILE implies a native fp16 cache (DECODE_ATTN_AMDGCN_FP16CACHE override). The owned tile's mandatory fp16 cast becomes a no-op -> the fp32->fp16 cast copy is dropped. Default (no owned route) stays fp32 -> gqa byte-identical.

decision_table.cast_visible_in_kernels: yes -- the route casts the materialized fp32 cache half to fp16 per layer/token (full-MAXC copy on top of the materialization both paths pay)
decision_table.native_fp16_recovers: +6.7%@ctx1024 / +7.1%@ctx4096 over the cast route (same-run relative); absolute +13/+16/+19/+23% vs gqa
decision_table.default_needs_fp32: no -- only the owned route needs fp16; default gqa keeps fp32
decision_table.route_local_without_default_change: yes -- gated; default cache_dtype stays fp32 (verified: default decode byte-identical, cache_dtype=dtypes.float)
decision_table.prefill_decode_handoff_safe: yes -- byte-identical to default gqa at ctx512/1024/2048 (k is fp16 originally; fp16-stored == fp32-stored-then-cast)
